decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to base_record_id "project_34th-st-sbs-2012", which is the correct registry record. The observation's source_id "2011_brt_34th_cb6_slides" is listed in that record's source_ids, and the observation's description of SBS on 34th Street from Twelfth Avenue to First Avenue with off-board fare collection, bus lanes, bus bulbs, and loading zones matches the registry record's payload exactly. No link to a different record is warranted.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34th Street SBS - Presentation to Manhattan Community Board 6, November 7, 2011
